ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "primary_position" TEXT /* Primary position played by the player (e.g., Pitcher, Left Field) */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits the player has made */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats the player has had */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the player */,
  "primary_position_number" INTEGER /* Number of the primary position played by the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Batting and throwing handedness */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the player's contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., Active, Injured, Retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_primary_position FOREIGN KEY ("primary_position") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., American League, National League) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Pitcher, Left Field) */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., Batting Average, ERA) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Year of the season the statistic is for */,
  "game_count" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team that played */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team that played */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., Hits, Runs) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "inning" TEXT /* Inning in which the statistic was recorded */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., Sprain, Fracture) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., Active, Rehab) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of recovery */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Location of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team involved in the trade */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team involved in the trade */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "trade_details" TEXT /* Details of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Coach, Scout) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the note is about */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was made */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_notes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the news article is about */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the news article is about */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "news_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
